domain_terms.recent_transactions: created_at::bigint > EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
domain_terms.this_month: EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(created_at::bigint)) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
domain_terms.last_month: EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(created_at::bigint)) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
domain_terms.biggest_client: sender_id GROUP BY sender_id ORDER BY SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) DESC LIMIT 1
domain_terms.top_client: sender_id GROUP BY sender_id ORDER BY SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) DESC LIMIT 1
domain_terms.largest_client: sender_id GROUP BY sender_id ORDER BY SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) DESC LIMIT 1
domain_terms.most_active_client: sender_id GROUP BY sender_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
domain_terms.top_sender: sender_id GROUP BY sender_id ORDER BY SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) DESC LIMIT 5
domain_terms.biggest_receiver: reciever_id GROUP BY reciever_id ORDER BY SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) DESC LIMIT 1
